title: Thai Popping Bowl
description: A spicy and savory Thai-inspired bowl dish featuring popping rice and a variety of fresh ingredients.

ingredients.name: bowl-filling vegetables (bell peppers, carrots, green onions)

instructions: Cook the popping rice according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the halved cherry tomatoes, sliced bowl-filling vegetables, and cooked popping rice.
In a small bowl, whisk together the thai chili sauce and fish sauce.
Pour the sauce over the rice mixture and toss to combine.
Stir in the coconut milk and season with salt to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
